recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, finds out that his uncle Claudius killed his father to obtain the throne, and plans revenge.

recommendations.title: Romeo and Juliet
recommendations.overview: Romeo Montague and Juliet Capulet fall in love against the wishes of their feuding families. Driven by their passion, the young lovers defy their destiny and elope, only to suffer the ultimate tragedy.

recommendations.title: Brother Sun, Sister Moon

recommendations.title: Jane Eyre

recommendations.title: Tea with Mussolini

recommendations.title: Southpaw
recommendations.overview: Billy "The Great" Hope, the reigning junior middleweight boxing champion, has an impressive career, a loving wife and daughter, and a lavish lifestyle. However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manage

recommendations.title: The Hunt
recommendations.overview: A teacher lives a lonely life, all the while struggling over his son’s custody. His life slowly gets better as he finds love and receives good news from his son, but his new luck is about to be brutally shattered by an innocent little lie.
